modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to activate the ruler feature in Word.

full_description_text: Trying to use Word for a project. Need the ruler for alignment. Can't find how to turn it on. Frustrating experience with the interface.
short_description: Unable to activate the ruler feature in Word.
description: Trying to use Word for a project. Need the ruler for alignment. Can't find how to turn it on. Frustrating experience with the interface.
